zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Katherine Pabenham於1372年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾騰福德時，她的父親Laurence de Pabenham39歲，母親Elizabeth Engaine32歲。她於1397年與Thomas Aylesbury在英國諾薩普頓史爾騰福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1436年6月17日在英國巴金哈姆爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Katherine Pabenham于1372年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾騰福德时，她的父亲Laurence de Pabenham39岁，母亲Elizabeth Engaine32岁。她于1397年与Thomas Aylesbury在英国諾薩普頓史爾騰福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1436年6月17日在英国巴金哈姆爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Pabenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Katherine Pabenham was born in 1372, in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Laurence de Pabenham, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth Engaine, was 32. She married Thomas Aylesbury in 1397, in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 17 June 1436, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Katherine Pabenham est née en 1372, à Thenford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Laurence de Pabenham, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Engaine, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Aylesbury en 1397, à Thenford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 juin 1436, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Katherine Pabenham 1372 in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Laurence de Pabenham 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Engaine 32. Sie hat 1397 in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England Thomas Aylesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Juni 1436 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Pabenham è nata il nel 1372 nel Thenford, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Laurence de Pabenham, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Engaine, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Aylesbury nel 1397, nel Thenford, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 giugno 1436, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Pabenhamが1372年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスエンフォードで生まれた時，父Laurence de Pabenhamは39歳，母Elizabeth Engaineは32歳であった。1397年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスエンフォードでThomas Aylesburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1436年6月17日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで64歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Pabenham(이)가 1372년 영국 노르섬프토실르 테퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Laurence de Pabenham(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Engaine(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 노르섬프토실르 테퍼드에서 Thomas Aylesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1436년 6월 17일 영국 벅잉함실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Pabenham nasceu em 1372, em Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Laurence de Pabenham, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Engaine, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Aylesbury em 1397, em Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de junho de 1436, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Katherine Pabenham родилась в 1372 г. в местности тенфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Laurence de Pabenham было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Engaine, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Aylesbury в 1397 г. в местности тенфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 17 июня 1436 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Katherine Pabenham nació en 1372, en Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Laurence de Pabenham, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Engaine, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Thomas Aylesbury en 1397, en Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de junio de 1436, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
